pageSummary: Connect your PalmPay merchant account so Capisum can sign payout requests with your RSA private key.
credentialsDescription: Enter your PalmPay account details and RSA private key.
ipAllowlistDescription: Add every Capisum static IP in PalmPay before connecting.
webhookDescription: Add this URL in PalmPay and paste PalmPay’s platform public key.
webhookConfirmation: I've added this URL to my PalmPay webhook settings
reviewConfirmation: I've whitelisted these Capisum IPs in PalmPay
rsaSetupTitle: Generate an RSA key pair locally
rsaSetupDescription: Generate keys locally, upload the public key to PalmPay as base64, and paste the private key into Capisum.
rsaCopyPublicCommand: openssl rsa -pubin -in public.pem -outform DER | base64 | pbcopy
rsaPublicKeyHint: Paste into PalmPay as base64 only — do not include PEM headers.
rsaPrivateKeyHint: Paste the full private.pem into Capisum, including BEGIN/END lines.
platformPublicKeyNote: PalmPay’s platform public key verifies webhooks. It is not the public.pem you uploaded to PalmPay.
